situational_context: Early rebuild phase with return-to-running protocol active (week 3, Run #2 completed May 9, Run #3 conditional for May 15). Chronic load slowly increasing (22.8, 1.4% of historical peak) but ACWR at 0.75 indicates insufficient acute stimulus. Training status: Detraining. Weight trending down nicely (-2.8 kg over 28d, now 104.1 kg). Activity mix is primarily ebike commuting (2x/week sur site) + structured cycling + biweekly short runs. HRV stable at 38, readiness consistently high (75-92). Sleep mostly adequate (7.4h avg) but variable with occasional baby-disrupted nights. Sur site days with ebike commute provide light active recovery (suffer 7-9 per leg). Vitamin D supplementation ongoing.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Run #3 conditionnel OU Endurance vélo Z2

recommendations.text: Execute all 5 planned sessions this week (Wed-Sun) to rebuild acute load toward ACWR 0.80. Prioritize consistency over intensity — completing 4/5 is acceptable given baby constraints, but skipping 2+ sessions compounds the detraining signal.
recommendations.measurable: Acute load 7d ≥15 by Sunday with ≥4 completed sessions

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep recovery after tonight's 5.9h — target ≥7.5h the next 3 nights before Friday's Run #3. Short sleep before impact activity compounds tissue stress at 104 kg body weight.
recommendations.measurable: ≥7h sleep on 5+ of next 7 nights; zero nights below 6h

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake toward 150g target. Current 7d average is 120g (80% adherence). Distribute across 4 meals with ≥30g per sitting to support musculoskeletal adaptation during return-to-running.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Sustaining ≥35 ms confirms stable recovery; drop below 33 would flag overreaching
markers_to_watch.reason: HRV steady at 37-38 for 3+ weeks; any dip post-Run #3 warrants load reduction

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target gradual increase toward 0.80+ over next 2 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 0.75, below optimal band; consistent sessions should close the gap

markers_to_watch.threshold: Run #3 FC avg ≤145 bpm at 8:30-9:00/km pace
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #2 FC avg was 144 (+9 vs Run #1); if Run #3 FC >150 at same pace, extend spacing to 8+ days
